rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assign statements only for implementation-level bindings with existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Component type contracts should use visible inputs and outputs to define assumptions and guarantees
Implementation contracts may include assignments for subcomponent bindings
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted identifiers
Constants and equations are declared at component type scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without model exposure
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
